---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap. E.g. "I keep having to manually X because..."

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links, or anything else that helps.
